en: Can you guess? Sea creatures. This is a book by Eric Carle and read by me, Kim.
I have tiny fins and a curly tail. I am a seahorse.
I have claws and many legs. I am a lobster.
I have a bottlenose and flippers. I am a dolphin.
I have a shell that protects me. I am a sea turtle.
Were you able to guess all the sea creatures?
